name: A Squid Dish for Days of Abstinence--1475
recipeIngredient: Squid (cleaned and prepared by a fishmonger)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare squid by having it cleaned and any black liquid removed from the backbone by a skilled fishmonger.
2. Boil the squid thoroughly until cooked through.
3. Crush almonds in a mortar.
4. Create a paste by combining crushed almonds with rosewater strained through a sieve; alternatively, use juice of peas or white chickpeas if almond option is unavailable.
5. Add crushed grapes and five figs to the mixture.
6. Incorporate rock parsley and fresh marjoram leaves.
7. Season with cinnamon, ginger, sugar to taste.
8. Mix in beaten egg whites until well combined for better texture during cooking.
9. Grease a serving dish and place another greased layer on top; also add a crust beneath the dish.
10. Place the prepared mixture over the hearth at a safe distance from direct flame.
11. Sprinkle sugar and rosewater over the cooked mixture before serving.
This dish is meant to be enjoyed by all senses, offering a balanced flavor profile of savory, sweet, and aromatic notes.
